title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・“勝ちたい”

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That was my best performance yet! Someone tell
my heart to stop pounding!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Dang it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Dang it! Dang it! Dang it! Dang it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why'd ya lose, Tamamo?! Ya stupid idiot,
pip-squeak, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm not losin' next time... I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Seeing her so frustrated, I have to admit.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I've been running like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Even when I lost, I never got that frustrated. It
never hurt so much that I'd be shaking.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I was too focused on what everyone was saying
about me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I cared about it so much, I couldn't hear the
sound of my own heart.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
How loud, how intense it is. How it's been
screaming this entire time.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Look, I...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to run.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I want to run! I want to run so bad! And... and I
want to win!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to win! I don't want to lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Gold City gazes out at the turf, the excitement
of the race still coursing through her veins...

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: City...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey—wait, what? Why are you crying?

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
To me, you'll always be the most beautiful when
you're modeling. I still stand by that.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
Standing in the spotlight, wowing all the
onlookers, you shine brighter than anything else
in the world.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
But today, I have to admit... you were incredibly...
incredibly beautiful out there, too.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
I could feel your love for racing in every step you
took. It exuded joy as pure as... as light itself.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
It was the same light I saw when I first scouted
you. Watching you sprint across the turf took my
breath away.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
At work, you always trusted us adults and did
everything we asked of you, even when you didn't
want to.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
But racing is different, isn't it? It's something you
wanted for yourself.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: I won't ask you to quit anymore. Run if you want.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text:
But please, just don't get yourself hurt. I don't
want any scratches on your face... or your heart.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: If racing ever becomes something that hurts you, I will intervene.

text_block_list.name: City's Manager
text_block_list.text: And you, Trainer... Please look after her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I swear she's like a helicopter mom. Like, come
on—getting hurt's just part of life!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
She always acts like that, so how was I supposed
to see... how much she really cares?
choice_data_list: Well, it can be hard to talk heart to heart.
Well, it can be hard to talk heart to heart.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Don't think she'd want to hear that coming from
you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's that supposed to mean? ...Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, about my next race. With the Osaka Hai
and Tenno Sho behind us, I guess it's gotta be...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Tamamo's gonna be there too.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Good. I'll make sure she can't ignore me again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: She will listen to what I have to say, no matter what.
